name: [KOKTEK-CJ] Création de commande cj et de facture client (Finale - 3 mars)

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  oi.*, 
  pv.cj_vid,
  pv.sku,
  p.title AS real_product_name,
  pv.option1_value_factorized AS variant_factorized,
  p.image AS main_product_image, 
  pv.image_url AS variant_image
FROM koktek.order_items oi
LEFT JOIN koktek.products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN koktek.product_variants pv ON oi.variant_id = pv.id
WHERE oi.order_id = $1;
UPDATE koktek.orders SET cj_order_id = $1 WHERE id = $2;

SELECT 
  o.id AS original_order_id,
  ob.invoice_number,
  ob.billing_name,
  ob.email,
  -- COALESCE = "Prends l'adresse de facturation, si elle est vide prends la livraison"
  COALESCE(ob.address_line1, od.address_line1) AS address_line1,
  COALESCE(ob.postal_code, od.postal_code) AS postal_code,
  COALESCE(ob.city, od.city) AS city,
  c.first_name, 
  c.last_name, 
  c.email AS customer_account_email,
  od.recipient_name,
  (SELECT invoice_number FROM koktek.order_billing WHERE invoice_number IS NOT NULL AND invoice_number != '' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_invoice_number
FROM koktek.orders o
LEFT JOIN koktek.order_billing ob ON o.id = ob.order_id
LEFT JOIN koktek.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN koktek.order_delivery od ON o.id = od.order_id
WHERE o.id = $1;

parameters.subject: =Votre facture KOKTEK - Commande {{ $('[CODE] Format Invoice Data').first().json.order.id }}
parameters.html:
=

Bonjour {{ $('[CODE] Format Invoice Data').first().json.client.name }},

Merci pour votre confiance et votre achat sur KOKTEK !

Vous trouverez ci-joint la facture au format PDF correspondant à votre commande {{ $('[CODE] Format Invoice Data').first().json.order.id }}.

Si vous avez la moindre question, n'hésitez pas à répondre directement à cet e-mail.

À très bientôt,
L'équipe KOKTEK

parameters.query:
-- 1. L'arme nucléaire : on remplit TOUTES les colonnes d'adresse d'un coup
INSERT INTO koktek.order_billing (
    id, 
    order_id, 
    billing_name, 
    email, 
    address_line1, 
    postal_code, 
    city, 
    country,
    created_at
)
SELECT 
    gen_random_uuid(), 
    $2, 
    $3, 
    $4, 
    $5, 
    $6, 
    $7, 
    'France',
    NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM koktek.order_billing WHERE order_id = $2);

-- 2. On insère notre numéro de facture
UPDATE koktek.order_billing 
SET invoice_number = $1 
WHERE order_id = $2
RETURNING *;
